channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download Kali Linux 2026.1
item.description: Kali contains a wide range of hacker tools and utilities (password attacks, sniffing and spoofing, reverse engineering, ...). Foreign WiFi/WLAN attacks (wireless attacks) and more. Kali is designed for digital forensics and penetration testing. Kali, the most advanced and flexible penetration testing distribution ever created. Kali has grown far beyond its humble origins as a live DVD and is now a full-fledged operating system. Features of Kali Linux The most advanced penetration...

item.title: Download Foxit PDF Editor Pro 14.0.3.33502 Multilingual
item.description: Foxit PDF Editor Pro is a professional PDF editing software designed for personal and business users who need advanced capabilities to create, edit, secure and manage PDF documents. This Foxit software can combine, split or repackage multiple PDF files. Documents can be merged or split based on page numbers, page layout or bookmarks. Additionally, this Suite can batch convert existing documents into one or more PDF files. Features of Foxit PDF Editor Pro Advanced PDF editing with...

item.title: Download Screencapt Professional 3.004
item.description: Screencapt Professional is powerful Windows software for screen recording that allows you to accurately and easily record any on-screen activity. Whether you want to create tutorials, record webinars, or simply record your favorite games, Screencapt gives you all the tools you need. With Screencapt, you can record the entire screen, a selected area, or a specific window. This flexibility makes Screencapt the perfect screen recorder for any type of application. item.title: Download EditPlus 6.1 Build 866
item.description: EditPlus is editor text, editor, HTML and editor program for Windows. EditPlus works as a text editor as well as editor, PHP editor, HTML, editor, Java viewer and Hex. It supports syntax highlighting for many languages, such as HTML, CSS, Java, PHP, C / C ++, Perl, and Python, and can act as a web browser to preview the HTML page. EditPlus also provides some other useful features, such as auto completion, code folding, spell checking, search and replace, keyboard shortcuts, custom and HTML...

item.title: Download Converseen 0.15.2.2
item.description: Converseen is a free cross-platform batch image processor for Windows and Linux that allows you to convert, resize, rotate, and flip countless images with just one click. Moreover, Converseen can convert an entire PDF file into a series of images with the characteristics you like: you can choose one of more than 100 formats, you can set the size, resolution and name file. Conversion, thanks to ImageMagick, the powerful image manipulation library on which the program is based, can...

Users do not need to make manual adjustments to achieve optimal situations. MSI Center combines all of MSI's exclusive...

item.title: Download TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 8.8.0
item.description: TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 is a program that allows users to discover hidden settings in Windows 11. This application is specially designed for Windows 11, groups many registry settings and distribute them from the easy and secure user interface. With TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 you can move the Windows taskbar to the top and resize the taskbar by editing the registry value. With any application that modifies the registry, we recommend that you have a backup copy...

item.description: WinTools.one is a program designed to help both regular and advanced users as well as computer engineers fine-tune the MS Windows operating system. It allows you to increase the performance of the operating system, maintain its performance at a high level, fix operating system errors, free up space on the computer's hard drive and control the operation of installed programs. In addition, the program allows you to store and protect your secret and confidential information, as well as work...

item.title: Download AI Text To Speech Generator Pro 1.1.2
item.description: Transform your text into hyper-realistic, human-like audio with AI Text To Speech Generator Pro. Whether you're a video voiceover creator, a student listening to study notes, or an author creating audiobooks, this powerful desktop utility provides professional speech synthesis without expensive monthly subscription fees. Unlike cloud-based solutions, AI Text To Speech Generator Pro runs state-of-the-art neural network models directly on your PC. This ensures 100% privacy, no data...

item.title: Download Obsidian 1.12.7
item.description: Obsidian is a powerful knowledge base that operates on a local folder containing plain text Markdown files. It allows users to create internal links for notes and then display the connections as a graph. Additionally users can also organize and structure their thoughts and knowledge in a flexible, non-linear way. Features of Obsidian Personal notes: Links: Create connections between your notes. Graph: Visualize the relationships between your notes. Plugins: Build your ideal...

item.title: Download AutoPowerOptionsOK 6.41
item.description: AutoPowerOptionsOK is a small program that can automatically turn off your screen, put your computer in sleep mode or switch between the power options. Each action can be triggered based on the absence of events keyboard and / or mouse for a specified time interval. For example, you can automatically turn off the screen if the mouse or keyboard has not been used in 10 minutes. AutoPowerOptionsOK - power Management automatically AutoPowerOptionsOK is a compact tool designed to help you...

item.title: Download VideoByte BD-DVD Ripper 2.2.38
item.description: VideoByte BD-DVD Ripper is a versatile program to convert Blu-ray and DVD discs (including ISO and VIDEO_TS folders) to digital video and audio files on Windows and macOS. The software is designed to handle both homemade discs and most copyright-protected commercial discs, so users can backup and watch movies on computers, phones, TVs, and media servers instead of having to use physical discs every time. Features of VideoByte BD-DVD Ripper Supports Blu-ray and DVD discs, folders, and...

item.title: Download WinFindr 1.9 + Portable
item.description: WinFindr is a powerful yet easy-to-use data search engine for Windows. WinFindr allows you to search for files, folders, registry keys and registry entries with multiple search terms at once. You have the option to use wildcards and regular expressions, as well as common searches, file masks, or a combination of the two. A useful feature of WinFindr is the ability to save your search results in TXT, CSV or HTML format, depending on your needs. This can be a valuable time saver if you...

Live preview can collapse, synchronized allows you to see the output of when you enter. You can easily embed images, links, emoticons and code in text form or by using the support UI lightness of we to simplify many operations. You can also paste and drag images directly into the editor. Markdown Monster is a solution comprehensive software designed to solve almost any...

item.title: Download Unicodia 3.1.2
item.description: Unicodia is free, open source software that can be used as an alternative character map for your Windows machine. The interface contains everything you need, allowing you to easily cycle through all the available ASCII symbols and copy them to the clipboard. Uncicodia is a great alternative to your standard Unicode characters and is filled with symbols/characters that make it useful for a number of different uses. Features of Unicodia In Windows 10/11 — all characters of Unicode 15...

item.title: Download Fan Control v264
item.description: FanControl is a highly customizable fan control software for Windows. Stay in control of every aspect of your PC's GPU and CPU fan with the help of this highly customizable fan control app. Features of FanControl Save, edit and load multiple configurations Multiple temperature sources (CPU, GPU, motherboard, hard drive, ".sensor" files) Custom fan curve Fine tune fan control response with steps,% start,% stop, response time and delay Mix different curves and sensors...

item.title: Download AnyDesk 9.6.12
item.description: AnyDesk is software computer control remote, easy connection with remote computer management and manipulation on the computer. After installing the AnyDesk up 2 the computer then you can easily use the software to provide technical support for a friend or family member or you have access to your computer while you away from home or office. AnyDesk - control your computer remotely The process of using very simple software, want to allow access to his computer, only need to provide for...

item.title: Download HDD Raw Copy Tool 2.5
item.description: HDD Raw Copy Tool is software that creates exact copies of SATA, IDE, SAS, SCSI or SSD hard drives. It can create sector-by-sector copies of all sectors of the hard drive (MBR, boot record, all partitions as well as the space in between). Additionally, HDD Raw Copy Tool can create accurate raw (dd) or compressed images of the entire media (including service data such as MBR, Boot Record, etc.). Features of HDD Raw Copy Tool Data recovery: make a copy of the damaged drive to attempt...
